title: Property Consultant - Select CityWalk - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Select CityWalk - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Select CityWalk, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Ahmedabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Select CityWalk:
Select CityWalk is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Select CityWalk!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
